subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who speaketh the truth! Verily, He is the Herald between the heavens and the earth when His call is raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ینطق بالحق انه لهو المناد بین السموات و الارضین اذا ارتفع من شطره
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @station of the Manifestation of God, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
